mapper.select: select max(CLUST_RECNO) from synlte.OBJECTFIELD where objectid = #{objectId} and CLUST_RECNO is not null
select max(CLUST_RECNO) from synlte.OBJECTFIELD where objectid = #{objectId} and CLUST_RECNO is not null and COLUMNNAME =#{columnName}
select max(PK_RECNO) from synlte.OBJECTFIELD where objectid = #{objectId} and PK_RECNO is not null
select max(PK_RECNO) from synlte.OBJECTFIELD where objectid = #{objectId} and COLUMNNAME = #{columnName} and PK_RECNO is not null
select max(MD5_INDEX) from synlte.OBJECTFIELD where objectid = #{objectId} and MD5_INDEX is not null
select max(MD5_INDEX) from synlte.OBJECTFIELD where objectid = #{objectId} and COLUMNNAME = #{columnName} and MD5_INDEX is not null
select case when max(RECNO) is null then 0 else max(RECNO) end from synlte.OBJECTFIELD where objectid = #{objectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE synlte.OBJECTFIELD set deleted = 1 , FIELDID = FIELDID||'-'||#{randomStr} , COLUMNNAME = COLUMNNAME||'-'||#{randomStr} , recno = -1 ,STANDARD_RECNO = -1 where objectid =#{objectId} and COLUMNNAME = #{columnName} and deleted = 0

UPDATE synlte.OBJECTFIELD set INDEXTYPE=#{indexType,jdbcType=INTEGER},ISINDEX=#{isIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, NEEDVALUE=#{needValue},ISCONTORL=#{isContorl,jdbcType=INTEGER}, MEMO=#{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLEINDEX=#{tableIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER},ISQUERY=#{isQuery,jdbcType=INTEGER},COLUMNNAME_STATE=#{columnNameState}, VERSION=#{version},ISPRIVATE=#{isPrivate},PARTITION_RECNO=#{partitionRecno,jdbcType=INTEGER},ORA_SHOW=#{oraShow,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ODPS_PATTITION=#{odpsPattition},PRO_TYPE=#{proType},FIELDID=#{fieldId},FIELDCHINEENAME=#{fieldChineseName}, FIELDTYPE=#{fieldType},FIELDLEN=#{fieldLen},DEFAULTVALUE=#{defaultValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FIELDDESCRIBE=#{fieldDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR},FIELDNAME =#{fieldName},FIELDSOURCETYPE=#{fieldSourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, recno=#{recno},STANDARD_RECNO=#{recno},CLUST_RECNO=#{clustRecno},PK_RECNO = #{pkRecno},MD5_INDEX = #{md5Index}, DETERMINERID=#{determinerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},ZDMGDFLDM=#{securityLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GADSJ_FIELDID=#{gadsjFieldId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},DELETED=0,ZDFL=#{fieldClassId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},SJLYGCFL=#{sjlygcfl,jdbcType=INTEGER}, RECONCILIATIONTYPE=#{reconciliationType,jdbcType=INTEGER} where OBJECTID =#{objectId} and COLUMNNAME=#{columnName}
UPDATE synlte.OBJECTFIELD set CLUST_RECNO = #{clustRecno} where OBJECTID =#{objectId} and COLUMNNAME = #{columnName}
UPDATE synlte.OBJECTFIELD set PK_RECNO = #{pkRecno} where OBJECTID =#{objectId} and COLUMNNAME = #{columnName}
UPDATE synlte.OBJECTFIELD set MD5_INDEX = #{md5Index} where OBJECTID =#{objectId} and COLUMNNAME = #{columnName}
mapper.select: select FIELDID as fieldId , FIELDNAME as fieldName , fieldchinesename as fieldChineseName,fieldtype as fieldType, FIELDLEN as fieldLen,columnname as columnName ,fieldchinesename as memo, 1 as needValue ,0 as isContorl,0 as tableIndex0 , 0 as deleted,1 as isQuery,1 as columnNameState , 0 as version,'0' as isPrivate, 0 as standardRecno, 0 as oraShow,GADSJ_FIELDID as gadsj_fieldId from synlte.synltefield where upper(fieldId) = #{fieldId}
